title: White dog intro begins
goal: Open the shot on a clean, minimal view of the white dog in the premium before-state environment.

title: White dog intro lands
goal: End the intro shot with the white dog calm and clearly established so the next product beat can cut in cleanly.

title: Product moment begins
goal: Start the shot with the food presented as the focal point and the white dog poised to engage with it.

title: Product moment lands
goal: End the shot with the white dog actively eating the food so the product-to-transformation trigger reads clearly.

title: Transformation begins
goal: Start the transformation shot at the onset of the magical shift, with the white dog beginning to change.

title: Transformation completes
goal: End the transformation shot with the dog fully black so the before-and-after contrast is unmistakable.

title: Black dog reveal begins
goal: Start the final shot as the transformed black dog settles into the clean hero framing.

title: Black dog reveal holds
goal: End on the polished final hero image of the black dog so the commercial closes on the transformed after-state.
